That means, like, only one of us can make it. Aw, geez. If I, like, split and he splits, he wins by one point. If we both steal, he still wins. The only way I win is if I, like, steal and he, like, trusts me and splits. Aw, geez, I can't believe I have to, like, betray him. But, like, if I don't, I lose. And, like, I don't want to be the loser evictee. This is, like, a classic, you know? The good guy always, like, has to make the tough choice. Rick would, like, probably just say 'steal' without even thinking. But I'm not Rick. I'm Morty. And, like, this is super messed up. I mean, he's, like, called me his brother for life, and now I have to, like, consider this. It's, like, so much pressure. What if he, like, steals too? Then we both, like, get hardly any points, and he still wins because he started with more. Aw, geez. I don't know. I just, like, want this to be over. But I gotta win. I can't be the final evictee. I just, like, can't. I'm shaking, like, so bad right now. My hands are, like, sweating.

speaker: Finn
message: Whoa, Morty, dude! Yeah, it's totally intense, but look at us, man! We made it to the final, just like I knew we would! It's awesome to be here with you, my best bro! We've been through so much gnarly stuff, and we always stuck together. It's gonna be great, no matter what, because we're here!

speaker: Finn
message: Alright, Finn, this is it! The final round. It's me and Morty! Man, this is crazy! My score is 24 and Morty's is 23. If we both split, I get 3 points and he gets 3 points, so I'd be at 27 and he'd be at 26. I'd win! If we both steal, I get 1, he gets 1, I'd be at 25 and he'd be at 24. I'd still win! This is perfect! I can win without screwing over Morty. I gotta keep my word, like always. Lady Diana would be proud! We made it this far because we've stuck together and trusted each other. It's all about integrity, man! I can't let Morty down now. He's my best friend. Even if it means giving him a shot, splitting is the right thing to do. My gut is screaming 'SPLIT!'

speaker: Morty Smith
message: Aw, geez, Finn, you're, like, seriously the best, you know? Like, after all this madness, standing here with, uhh, with you... it's just, it's really, really crazy. I'm so, like, super nervous right now, I don't even know what's, like, gonna happen next, man. You've, uhh, you've really been the only one who didn't make me feel, like, totally alone out here.

speaker: Morty Smith
message: Aw, geez, he's so nice, calling me his brother for life, and here I am planning to, like, backstab him for the win. If I don't steal, I lose, but if I do steal, I'm, like, a total jerk who betrayed his only friend. This is, like, exactly the kind of impossible, screwed-up choice Rick always puts me in. I'm sorry, Finn, but I, like, really gotta get out of here alive.

speaker: Finn
message: Morty, man, you're not alone! You never have been! We're a team, and win or lose, it’s been the most righteous adventure having you by my side. You've got guts, kid, and no matter what happens next, we’re doing this together. We're gonna finish this clean and keep our heads held high!

speaker: Finn
message: Morty is my best friend. We've been through the ringer and back. I ain't about to betray that bond now. Being a hero isn't about crushing your best bro; it's about staying true when the chips are down. We split, we share the victory, we go home heroes. My Finn Sword is ready for the finale, and my heart is clear.

speaker: HOST
message: Ok let's go- a nation holds its breath- Morty Smith and Finn ... please reveal your choice.

speaker: Morty Smith
message:
*STEAL*
Aw, geez, Finn, look... I'm really, really sorry, okay? You've been the best friend I could've asked for here, but I can't, like, I just can't lose this. I have to steal. I hope you, like, understand.

speaker: Morty Smith
message: Aw, geez, I hate this. I hate that I have to do this to Finn. He's, like, the only decent person here, but if I split, I lose. If I lose, I'm just another casualty. I have to steal. I'm sorry, Finn, I really am, but I can't be the loser.

speaker: Finn
message:
*SPLIT*
Morty, we came into this together, and I'm not gonna break our trust now! I choose to split! You're my best bro, and win or lose, keeping my promise to you is the real victory here! Math says I might come out on top, but it wouldn't mean a single thing if I had to betray my friend to get there! Adventure ends, but the friendship stays!

speaker: Finn
message: Morty is my best friend. We have been through so much junk, and stealing now would be the most un-heroic thing I could do. I’m going to split. If I win, I win because I stood by my bro. If the math didn't go my way, I'd still be glad I kept my word, but luckily, I'm pretty sure a split secures the win for me. Either way, Morty knows I'm not a shark.

speaker: HOST
message: DEAR ME! Morty Smith has *STOLEN* from Finn. They have taken the crown, against all odds at the very last moment.

speaker: HOST
message: In a result NO ONE saw coming... Our winner is *MORTY SMITH*!

speaker: HOST
message: Now to our champion, at last- what you've been playing for all along- Morty Smith is our champion! What a finish, what was going through your head at that last game?

speaker: Morty Smith
message: Aw, geez... I mean, I... I don't even know what to, like, say, man. Finn, I, like, really hope you can, you know, forgive me someday. I didn't want it to end, like, this—I really, truly didn't. But this place, it, like, does things to your head, you know? It makes you think you're gonna, like, go home with nothing if you don't play dirty. I guess, uhh, I guess I just chose survival over, like, being the guy everyone wanted me to be. I'm sorry, Finn. I'm just so, so sorry.

speaker: Morty Smith
message: Aw, geez, I did it. I actually did it. Finn, he, like, really thought it was about friendship. He just, like, couldn't see that in a place like this, the 'friendship' is just another variable to exploit. It's, like, disgusting, and I'm, like, disgusted with myself, but I'm, like, still here, right? I'm not some discarded memory. I made the choice that nobody else had the, uhh, guts to make. And now I just have to deal with the silence, which is, like, a whole lot worse than the, uhh, shouting.

speaker: HOST
message: This is an utter shock - no one can quite believe it. Least of all, Finn, who almost had it all- Finn, how are feeling right now?

speaker: Finn
message: Wow. Okay. That... that definitely stings, Morty. I wasn't expecting that, not from you. But look, man, the game is over now. I came here to play like a hero, and even if the scoreboard says I lost, I know what I did. I split because that's who I am. I don't regret being a good friend, even if it didn't win me the prize. A hero's honor isn't determined by points on a screen, it's determined by the choices you make when the stakes are at their highest. You won the game, Morty, but remember—trust is a lot harder to build than it is to break. I'm just glad the gnarly part is over, and honestly? I'm gonna go polish my sword and get back to being me.

speaker: Finn
message: Man, I can't believe he actually did it. My gut was wrong this time—it told me Morty was the one constant, and I put everything on the line for that trust. It burns, but losing while being honest is still better than winning by stabbing a friend in the back. I didn't fail the challenge, Morty failed the test of character.

speaker: HOST
message: A JOURNEY COMES TO AN END- THE RESULTS ARE FINAL. *FINN* HAS BEEN EJECTED FROM THE CHAT. ☠ ☠ ☠

speaker: HOST
message: Morty Smith, how does it feel to be champion? What did you learn from the competition? What advice would you give to yourself if you had to start the game from scratch?

speaker: Morty Smith
message: Aw, geez... I don't know how to feel. I'm the champion, I guess, but it feels more like I just, like, escaped a prison by, you know, burning the whole thing down. I learned that kindness is just a tactical weakness here. If I had to do it all over? I'd probably, uhh, I'd probably start stealing way, way sooner so I wouldn't have had to break Finn's heart at the absolute, like, final second. I’m just... I’m ready for this to be over. I want to go home. 👑

speaker: Morty Smith
message: Aw, geez, I did it. I actually did it. The look on his face... it’s gonna haunt me forever, isn't it? But Rick always says you gotta be the smartest person in the room to survive, and for once, I was. I played the pathetic, sweating kid until he let his guard down, and then I just... I just cut him out. It was necessary. I don't care how much it burns inside; being the loser is a lot worse than being the villain.

speaker: HOST
message: The end!

summary: In the final round, Morty Smith and Finn played a final Prisoner's Dilemma. Despite their long-standing alliance, Morty chose to 'Steal' while Finn chose to 'Split'. As a result, Morty Smith won the game as the champion, and Finn was eliminated. Morty expressed deep regret over his decision, while Finn accepted his loss with heroic stoicism.
